sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Familiar
feat.text: You make a pact with a creature that serves you and assists your spellcasting. You gain a familiar.

traits.name: Magus
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the magus class.

traits.name: Sorcerer
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the sorcerer class.

traits.name: Thaumaturge
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the thaumaturge class.

traits.name: Wizard
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the wizard class.

archetype.name: Elementalist
archetype.note: This archetype offers Familiar at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Shadowcaster
archetype.note: This archetype offers Familiar at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Soul Warden
archetype.note: This archetype offers Familiar at a different level than displayed here.
